name: Jindal Saw Limited
summary: Jindal Saw Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and supplies iron and steel pipes and pellets in India and internationally. It operates through Iron and Steel, Waterways Logistics, and Others segments. The company offers submerged arc welded pipes used in the transportation of oil, gas, slurry, water, and structural applications; ductile iron pipes, fittings, and accessories for water and waste-water transportation; carbon and alloy, and stainless steel pipes and tubes primarily used in petroleum, exploration, sugar, steel, bearing, automotive, general engineering, power, and process industries; and operates iron ore mine and pellet plant. It also provides precision stainless steel strips for use in the manufacturing of auto components, clocks, watches, and electrical equipment; drill pipes; soft magnetic nickel alloys; anti corrosion coating of pipes; induction bending of pipes; stainless and carbon steel tubes and welded pipes for the oil and gas, pulp and paper, food, pharmaceuticals, water and sanitation, petrochemical, and boiler and heat exchanger applications, as well as general engineering markets. In addition, the company engages in the transshipment and waterborne transportation businesses; building and repair of barges and ships; inland shipping, business process outsourcing and call center, advisory, helical anchor manufacturing, property holding, tools and fittings, deep-sea transloading, and information technology activities; and trading of pipes. Jindal Saw Limited was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in New Delhi, India.
